movie.actors: John Kassir, Dennis Miller, Erika Eleniak, Angie Everhart
movie.plot: The Crypt Keeper returns to tell the story of a funeral parlor that moonlights as a vampire bordello.
movie.title: Bordello of Blood
movie.writer: William M. Gaines (comic books "Tales From the Crypt"), Bob Gale (story), Robert Zemeckis (story), A L Katz (screenplay), Gilbert Adler (screenplay)
